tasks.title: Scaffold greenfield Node toolchain
tasks.description: Create package.json with the project toolchain scripts.
tasks.verification_hint: Run the configured test command after package.json is created.
instructions: Create package.json for a minimal Node.js project using built-in Node tooling.
Set scripts.test to "node --test" so the test command uses the node:test runner with zero test-framework dependencies.
Run npm install --save-dev typescript --package-lock=false so node_modules/.bin/tsc exists for type-check gates.
Do not add extra test framework dependencies for this scaffold task.

session.resume_instructions: Start a fresh execution session for task DEMAND-GREENFIELD-SCAFFOLD-001. Use .yolo/demand/DEMAND-20260705-GIT-WEEKLY/tasks/DEMAND-GREENFIELD-SCAFFOLD-001/session.json as the task session state plan and .yolo/demand/DEMAND-20260705-GIT-WEEKLY/tasks/DEMAND-GREENFIELD-SCAFFOLD-001/handoff.md for the next handoff when the session closes. Record command results, changed files, blockers, and acceptance evidence in the evidence path. Update the listed memory and progress targets before handing off.

handoff.plain_language_goal: Create package.json with the project toolchain scripts.
handoff.user_story: As the automation runner, I need package.json scripts before downstream tasks run.
handoff.current_behavior: The greenfield target has no package.json, so toolchain gates fail before implementation.
handoff.desired_behavior: package.json contains executable project toolchain scripts.
handoff.trigger: before any generated task with type/test post_conditions runs

scenario.proof: The configured test command executes successfully.

requirement.text: 用户可以运行 git-weekly --repo <path> --since YYYY-MM-DD --until YYYY-MM-DD，从 stdout 或 --output 文件得到确定性的 Markdown 周报

acceptance_criteria: package.json exposes node --test and TypeScript command availability when type gates are required.
instructions: Create package.json for a minimal Node.js project using built-in Node tooling.
Set scripts.test to "node --test" so the test command uses the node:test runner with zero test-framework dependencies.
Run npm install --save-dev typescript --package-lock=false so node_modules/.bin/tsc exists for type-check gates.
Do not add extra test framework dependencies for this scaffold task.
handoff.proof: package.json exists, npm test succeeds with node --test, and required toolchain commands are available.
handoff.verification_hint: Run npm test after package.json is created; when type gates are required, verify node_modules/.bin/tsc is available.

source_requirements.text: 用户可以运行 git-weekly --repo <path> --since YYYY-MM-DD --until YYYY-MM-DD，从 stdout 或 --output 文件得到确定性的 Markdown 周报
周报必须包含作者分组 commit 列表、feat 类型统计、Total commits、Lines added 和 Lines deleted
周报必须包含作者分组 commit 列表、fix 类型统计、Total commits、Lines added 和 Lines deleted
周报必须包含作者分组 commit 列表、chore 类型统计、Total commits、Lines added 和 Lines deleted
周报必须包含作者分组 commit 列表、docs 类型统计、Total commits、Lines added 和 Lines deleted
周报必须包含作者分组 commit 列表、refactor 类型统计、Total commits、Lines added 和 Lines deleted
周报必须包含作者分组 commit 列表、test 类型统计、Total commits、Lines added 和 Lines deleted
自动化成功标准只有一个外部验收动作：npm test 退出码为 0

out_of_scope: 范围边界：只做 Node.js 本地 CLI、package scripts、README 和自动化测试；不依赖网络、不调用 GitHub API、不做图形界面、不发布 npm 包、不分析 merge request、issue 或远端服务数据。
constraints: 范围边界：只做 Node.js 本地 CLI、package scripts、README 和自动化测试；不依赖网络、不调用 GitHub API、不做图形界面、不发布 npm 包、不分析 merge request、issue 或远端服务数据。

truths: Greenfield type/test gates require a local executable toolchain before downstream tasks run.

acceptance_criteria: package.json exposes node --test and TypeScript command availability when type gates are required.

post_conditions.message: Greenfield scaffold must create package.json before toolchain gates run.
package.json must expose a test script for config.build.test.
package.json test script must use the built-in node:test runner.
package.json must expose a typecheck script before type gates run.
package.json typecheck script must invoke the TypeScript compiler.
package.json must record TypeScript as a dev dependency before type gates run.
Configured test command must be available before downstream gates run.
Project tests must pass after this task.
Configured type_check command must be available before downstream gates run.
